inputs.label: Joint Length
inputs.businessContext: Total length of the joint to be caulked, in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total length of the joint to be caulked, in meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Derzlenen derzin toplam uzunluğu, metre cinsinden.

inputs.label: Joint Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the joint in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the joint in millimeters.

inputs.label: Joint Depth
inputs.businessContext: Depth of the joint in millimeters. Typically, depth should be about half the width for proper adhesion.

businessContext_i18n.en: Depth of the joint in millimeters. Typically, depth should be about half the width for proper adhesion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Derz derinliği, milimetre cinsinden. Tipik olarak, uygun yapışma için derinlik genişliğin yaklaşık yarısı kadar olmalıdır.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Extra material added to account for waste, overfilling, and tooling. Typical range: 5-15%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Extra material added to account for waste, overfilling, and tooling. Typical range: 5-15%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atık, aşırı doldurma ve şekillendirme için eklenen fazla malzeme. Tipik aralık: %5-15.

inputs.label: Tube Volume
inputs.businessContext: Volume of a single caulk tube in milliliters. Standard tubes are 310 mL.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of a single caulk tube in milliliters. Standard tubes are 310 mL.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir mastik tüpünün mililitre cinsinden hacmi. Standart tüpler 310 mL'dir.

inputs.label: Number of Joints
inputs.businessContext: Number of joints of identical dimensions to caulk.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of joints of identical dimensions to caulk.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
